---
name: Suggest a tool
about: Suggest a free tool/resource to add to the list
title: "[Suggestion] "
labels: enhancement
---

**Tool name and link:**

**Which section should it go in?**
(e.g. PCB Design, Debug Probes, TinyML — or propose a new section)

**What's actually free about it?**
(Be specific — full feature set, or a limited tier? Any account/signup required?)

**What are the real limits?**
(Rate limits, time limits, "non-commercial use only," etc. — anything that would surprise someone mid-project.)

**Anything else worth noting?**
